integration.note: Pre-existing integration test failures in tests/integration/api/file-upload.test.ts (5MB vs 20MB), tests/integration/api-hooks.test.ts, tests/integration/trust-dialog-auto-response.test.ts, and others are unrelated to Issue #644 and reference no files touched by this work.

summary: Issue #644 implemented end-to-end with the Red-Green-Refactor cycle. Added MAX_DISPLAY_NAME_LENGTH shared constant in src/config/repository-config.ts and refactored the PUT /api/repositories/[id] route to import it (error message text preserved). Added getAllRepositoriesWithWorktreeCount(db) in src/lib/db/db-repository.ts using a correlated subquery on worktrees.repository_path (NOT repository_id) while keeping the existing getAllRepositories(db) signature untouched. Exposed the list via a new GET /api/repositories handler and extended src/lib/api-client.ts with RepositoryListItem / UpdateRepositoryDisplayNameResponse types and repositoryApi.list() / updateDisplayName() methods. Implemented src/components/repository/RepositoryList.tsx with inline alias editing (Enter saves, Escape cancels, 100-char client-side validation, Disabled badge, dark mode, React.memo + useCallback), placed it above RepositoryManager in /repositories/page.tsx, and wired refreshKey so Add/Sync/Save all trigger a refetch. Added 15 integration tests (api-repositories-list.test.ts + api-repositories-put.test.ts) and 18 component unit tests for RepositoryList. All 6237 unit tests pass, all repository-related integration tests (73 total across 7 files) pass, npm run lint and npx tsc --noEmit are clean. Pre-existing unrelated integration test failures remain untouched and affect test files that reference neither the modified modules nor the new code.
